import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut current = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  let is_minus = b == 45

  if is_digit
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      current = 0
    end
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if is_minus and not in_num
    in_num = true
    current = 0
    sign = -1
  else
    if in_num
      let val = current * sign
      if not list.contains(nums, val)
        nums = list.push(nums, val)
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      current = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = current * sign
  if not list.contains(nums, val)
    nums = list.push(nums, val)
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x < y
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
  end
  sorted = new_sorted
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    output = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    output = "#{output} #{x}"
  end
end
println(output)
